title: Containment Lock
subtitle: SHIFT CIPHER OVERRIDE
intro: An encrypted transmission was intercepted on the raptor containment channel. Decode it to recover the lock code.
puzzleBody:
Shift cipher — move each letter backward in the alphabet by the same amount.
Shift key: how many raptors were in the Jurassic Park kitchen scene?
Write out the decoded message on paper, then enter the four-digit lock code below.
solvedMessage: Transmission decoded. Use this combination on Containment Lock.
